allow: Bash(node -e "console.log\('Current time:', new Date\(\).toISOString\(\)\); console.log\('Token expiry from image: 2026-05-02T15:36:00'\); const now = new Date\(\); const expiry = new Date\('2026-05-02T15:36:00'\); console.log\('Hours until expiry:', \(expiry - now\) / 1000 / 60 / 60\);")

Bash(node -e "const data = require\('./vngo_travel.pois.json'\); console.log\('Total POIs:', data.length\); console.log\('Sample POI codes:', data.slice\(0, 5\).map\(p => p.code\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('POI with zones:', data.filter\(p => p.zone\).length\); console.log\('APPROVED POIs:', data.filter\(p => p.status === 'APPROVED'\).length\);")

Bash(node -e "const zones = require\('./vngo_travel.zones.json'\); console.log\('Total Zones:', zones.length\); zones.forEach\(z => console.log\('Zone:', z.code, '| POIs:', z.poiCodes.length, '| Price:', z.price\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const users = require\('./vngo_travel.users.json'\); console.log\('Total Users:', users.length\); users.forEach\(u => console.log\('User:', u.email, '| Role:', u.role, '| Premium:', u.isPremium\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const data = require\('./vngo_travel.pois.json'\); const poi = data[0]; console.log\('POI Structure:'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(poi, null, 2\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const data = require\('./vngo_travel.pois.json'\); console.log\('POI Codes in DB:'\); data.slice\(0, 10\).forEach\(p => console.log\('-', p.code, '| Status:', p.status\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const pois = require\('./vngo_travel.pois.json'\); console.log\('Available POI Codes:'\); pois.filter\(p => p.status === 'APPROVED'\).forEach\(p => console.log\(p.code, '|', p.name, '| Lat:', p.location.coordinates[1], 'Lng:', p.location.coordinates[0]\)\);")
